item.description:
Habitat V0.1

Habitat is now out of beta!🎉🎊🥳🍾

  • Added: New tool! Burrow is here to give you a quick deep dive into folders and files to preview inside of finder!
  • Added: Echo Clipboard as an option in mouse and trackpad actions!
  • Added: Dock Icon appearance for pro users! More options to come!
  • Added: Restart Habitat button in the main menubar icon, as well as in settings in case users every experience any slowdowns or glitches.
  • Added: Option for 15% discount if users wish to share habitat on social media!
  • Added: Users can now copy their license key directly in the app after deactivating it.
  • Improved: App Icon! Little more simplified and is available as different colors in settings in the dock!
  • Improved: Boa Archive inspector was reworked into Burrow, and instead is now a file encryption and decryption tool as well as file compression!
  • Improved: Chomp app uninstaller file hierarchy search, now recognizes more file paths & types.
  • Improved: Video quality of carousel, slightly upscaled.
  • Improved: Shadow Nook now works on external monitors independently from Macbook notch.
  • Fixed: Shadow Shelf button now works if shelf is disabled from menu view.
  • Fixed: Hovering effect on buttons that had popup text needing 2 clicks to activate.
  • Fixed: Shadow file drop not opening when dragging file to notch.
  • Fixed: Shadow notch would just stall and crash unexpectely.
  • Fixed: Burrow toggle disappearing.


More to come.

— Thank you for all the support & feedback!
